name: docs-mcp
description: Search official documentation from any Git repository. Ingests Markdown/MDX/RST files and answers questions using hybrid semantic + full-text search.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search documentation using hybrid semantic and full-text search (RRF ranking)

tools.name: read_doc
tools.description: Read the full content of a documentation page as Markdown

tools.name: read_sections
tools.description: Read specific sections of a documentation page by heading

config_path.title: Config File
config_path.description: Your docs-mcp config.yaml. Download the template from https://github.com/leCielEtoile/custom-docs-mcp/blob/main/config.example.yaml and edit it to add your documentation sources.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API Key
openai_api_key.description: Required for embedding. Get yours at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
